text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
It's your haskap fairy come down from
Tomakomai, Hokko Tarumae! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, maybe calling myself a "fairy" could come
off as a little... Or no, is that the innocent vibe I
want?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
"Hello from the seas of Tomakomai! Clam got
your tongue? ☆ Don't be shy, it's Hokko
Tarumae!" ♪

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling that'll make more of an
impression, so let's go with that! My self-intro for
tomorrow's mini concert is all set!
